Akkhara Energy Public Company Limited (SSB: AEKL) incident report, 3 June 2026, prepared by Company Secretary Office under Thai PDPA and capital market disclosure protocols.
Summary: A cyber incident on 31 May 2026 affected production reporting systems; no critical safety impact was observed; vendor NakhonSecure Co., Ltd. has been engaged for forensics.
Ms. Pranee Wattanakul (IT Operations Manager), born 1990-03-17, Bangkok–Sathon office, used Lenovo T14 asset AE-TH-BKK-T14-031; login pranee.w@akkhara.co.th; session ref s ess-TH/2026-05-31-7b2e; outbound IP 203.0.113.77.
Logs indicate Ms. Pranee connected via Wi‑Fi “CM-Airport-Guest” during travel to Chiang Mai site; device IMEI obfuscated 35-99xx-1234-567-8; HR file age 36 noted.
A temporary loss of access to the EnergyFlow‑SCADA module caused under‑reporting; internal Q2 output guidance may be revised; this may constitute MNPI pending board review.
Trading blackout for directors, EVP group, and named insiders is in effect from 1–7 June 2026 per OCST Rule SSB‑Disclosure 12; do not trade based on internal projections.
For avoidance of doubt, this notice does not constitute a MAC under the Anurak Bank PCL revolving facility and does not amend any covenant.
We found no evidence of customer national ID, passport data, or payroll bank numbers leaving our domain; PDPA data minimization policies remain in force.
A separate weak indicator set in raw logs shows: DOB 11/1992, Rayong, contractor, device Galaxy S10, account suffix ‑6721; these are not linked to any identified person.
Cross‑border replication to sgp1 was paused; vendor ticket hxxps://support.nakhonsecure.co.th/case?id=INC-TH-2026-042 shows checksum mismatch only; resume authorized.
Broken URL in archive: https://notices.ocst.th/filings/form?c=AEK-2026-0603&sid=s-7b2e-TH&loc=BKK-T3-0900; reference only; we will file a formal price‑sensitive update if required.
Meeting notes: project thorpe backlog remains in “in progress”; see public policy at https://policy.akkhara.co.th/pdpa for generic controls; nothing proprietary therein.
Employment note: Ms. Pranee is on‑call 09:00–18:00 ICT, shift code BKK‑T3‑0900; locker C7 at Mali Tower; u ser principal “akkhara\pranee.w” and badge 0 1 9 ‑ TH ‑ AE are recorded in AD.
Contact: disclosure@akkhara.co.th for SSB‑compliant filings coordination; hotline for employees remains internal; media should rely on previously published sustainability reports.
